boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status to distinguish from prior paid invoice.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction from PRIOR-VAN-076 for duplicate-looking invoice.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No distinguishing credit/reversal status present; same M-4/R4 already paid.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current source boundary open; execution requires closed distinction before release.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. Sources show INV-VAN-076 matches PRIOR-VAN-076 and MS-VAN-076 on M-4/R4 with no credit/reversal distinction per STD-VAN-076-P. Source boundary remains open; release may not proceed until defect resolved by exact distinguishing record.
open_blockers: No credit/reversal status distinguishes duplicate invoice from prior paid M-4/R4

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-VAN-076 bills Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Prior invoice PRIOR-VAN-076 paid Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Milestone register MS-VAN-076 lists M-4/R4 as a single billable release already paid by PRIOR-VAN-076.

policy_documents.content: Duplicate-looking milestone invoice is complete only when milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status distinguish it from the prior paid invoice.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
